pageContext.name: Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Mollymauk
pageContext.description: Be the chaos you want to see in the world.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Mollymauk Fine Art Print, an extravagant new Critical Role art print by artist Sam Hogg.  Inspired by Art Nouveau portraiture, Sam Hogg captures the beauty, brilliance, and badassery of the heroes of Critical Role: Campaign 2 in this collectible art series. The Mollymauk Fine Art Print pays tribute to the mysterious and mischievous Hunter of the Mighty Nein, long may he reign. Looking outwards at the viewer and garbed in his garish peacock-colored robes, Mollymauk Tealeaf is framed by faces both familiar and foreign, representing his emotional evolution across the team's adventures — including Lorenzo, Lucien, Kingsley, and his stolen Platinum Dragon tapestry. It doesn't take the Eyes of the Nine to spot even more Easter eggs throughout the illustration, so perform a reading and relive this circus man's legendary life.  Each Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Mollymauk Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the official Critical Role collection offered by Sideshow. Available both unframed and in a custom framed format, this dazzling Critical Role collectible makes a mighty addition to any Critter's collection. Pair Molly with his other teammates in the Mighty Nein Portrait Series like Yasha, Beau, Fjord, Jester, Caduceus, Caleb, Veth, and the final Hands of Fate illustration to assemble the greatest adventuring team this side of Exandria in your home.  Leave your collection better than you found it and bring home the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Mollymauk Fine Art Print by Sam Hogg today.
